rows.label: xs08070100_MSG0001
rows.name: Wh-What's next?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08070100_MSG0002
rows.name:
Calm down. The enemies around
here are cleared out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08070100_MSG0003
rows.name:
No enemy signatures in the vicinity. All enemy
craft within the combat zone eliminated.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08070100_MSG0004
rows.name: Understood.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08070100_MSG0005
rows.name: We did it, Elma-san![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08070100_JNK0010
rows.name: Cautious

rows.label: xs08070100_SEL0011
rows.name: Brace yourself, saying this was only the opening skirmish.

rows.label: xs08070100_JNK0020
rows.name: Optimistic

rows.label: xs08070100_SEL0021
rows.name: Look to Lin, hoping for a celebratory meal.

rows.label: xs08070100_MSG0006
rows.name: That's probably right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08070100_MSG0007
rows.name:
If they mean to take NLA, there
are far too few of them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08070100_MSG0008
rows.name:
They turned tail and fled
before Tatsu's terror, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08070100_MSG0009
rows.name: Tatsu was working hard, wasn't he?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08070100_MSG0010
rows.name: I'll whip up a feast today![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08070100_MSG0011
rows.name: Yay, mo! A party, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08070100_MSG0012
rows.name: Not yet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08070100_MSG0013
rows.name:
If they mean to take NLA, there
are far too few of them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08070100_MSG0014
rows.name:
New enemy air units confirmed!
Directly overhead![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08070100_MSG0015
rows.name:
Approaching at high speed
from directly above NLA![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08070100_MSG0016
rows.name:
Just as I thought, the ground force was a
feint. We'll meet them inside the city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08070100_MSG0017
rows.name: We're going to fight in the city streets?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08070100_MSG0018
rows.name: Lin, I understand how you feel.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08070100_MSG0019
rows.name:
But now that it's come to this, street fighting is unavoidable. If
we fear damage to the city and lose everything, there's no point.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08070100_MSG0020
rows.name:
Enemy air units have breached the
defense line! Entering NLA airspace![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08070100_MSG0021
rows.name: This is bad, mo! This is bad, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08070100_MSG0022
rows.name: Let's hurry![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08070100_MSG0023
rows.name: Roger![ST:wait ]
